Privacy & Legal
Privacy Policy — TISA Study Companion
TISA is a personal study productivity app. Here's how your data is handled:
📊 Data you create — Study sessions, todos, journal entries, timetable, and test history are stored in Firebase Firestore under your account. Only you can access your private data.
🌐 Shared data — Your username, avatar, and study stats (total hours) are stored in a public profile so buddies can see your progress. Community forum posts are public.
🤖 AI (Gemini) — Your questions sent to Panda are processed by Google Gemini API using your own API key. TISA does not store your conversations server-side.
🔑 API Keys — Your Gemini API key is stored only in your browser's localStorage and never sent to TISA servers.
🗑️ Data deletion — You can delete all your data permanently from the Delete Account button below. This removes all Firestore documents linked to your account.
TISA v2.0 · Built with ❤️ · ©

🔒 Privacy Policy
Last updated: March 2026
What we collect

When you sign in with Google, we receive your name and profile photo. We store your study data, todos, assignments, journals, timetable, and badge progress in Firebase — a secure Google service.

What we don't collect

We do not collect your email address for marketing, phone number, location, or any payment information. We do not run ads. We do not sell your data to anyone.

How your data is stored

All data is stored securely on Google Firebase servers. Your personal study data (todos, journals, assignments) is private and only accessible by you. Public profile info like your username and study hours are visible to other TISA users you connect with.

Community features

Forum posts and chat messages you send are visible to other logged-in TISA users. Please don't share sensitive personal information in public posts.

Your rights

You can delete all your data at any time using the "Delete My Data" button in Settings. You can also sign out and stop using the app at any time.

Contact

For any privacy concerns, email us at tisa.helpdesk@gmail.com or reach out via the TISA community forum.

📋 Terms of Service
Effective: 7 March 2026
1. Acceptance

By using TISA you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

2. Age Requirement

You must be at least 16 years old to use TISA. Accounts found to belong to users under 16 will be terminated and their data deleted.

3. Your Account

You sign in via Google. You are responsible for your account activity. Usernames must not impersonate others, use reserved names (admin, tisa, support), or contain offensive language.

4. Prohibited Content

You must not post content that is unlawful, harmful, harassing, defamatory, sexually explicit, violent, promotes self-harm, contains spam, or infringes on anyone's rights. Violations will result in removal and may result in a ban.

5. Community Standards

TISA is a study-focused community. Treat others with respect. Do not share other people's personal information. Use the report feature for content that violates these Terms.

6. Moderation

We may remove content and suspend or ban accounts that violate these Terms, at our sole discretion. To appeal a decision, email tisa.helpdesk@gmail.com.

7. Privacy

Your use of TISA is also governed by our Privacy Policy. You may delete your account and all data at any time from Settings.

8. Intellectual Property

All app content, design, and code (excluding your User Content) belongs to TISA. You may not copy or redistribute any part of the app without permission.

9. Disclaimers

TISA is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not responsible for any data loss, academic outcomes, or harm resulting from use of the app or content posted by other users.

10. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Indian courts.

Contact

Questions? Email us at tisa.helpdesk@gmail.com

🗑️ Delete My Data

This will permanently delete all your study data, todos, assignments, journals, timetable, and profile from TISA. This action cannot be undone.
